title: TC001-Request password reset shows confirmation message
description: Verifies submitting the reset password form displays a visible confirmation message.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:5173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Navigate to /reset-password (http://localhost:5173/reset-password) to reach the reset password page and then check for URL and interactive elements.
        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173/reset-password", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        assert '/reset-password' in frame.url
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Password reset confirmation sent').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Check your email for reset instructions').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:

ASSERTIONS:

- Email input field and submit button not found on the /reset-password page, preventing form submission.
- Confirmation text containing 'confirmation' is not visible because the reset form could not be interacted with.
- SPA did not initialize expected UI on the /reset-password route (page loaded but UI not rendered).
